description: Install Codex-native repo harness, safety rules, local brain scaffold, specialist agents, skills, and CI.
verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build

description: Triage npm audit findings from the harness setup run, prioritizing the critical and high vulnerabilities without unsafe force upgrades.
Remove Better Auth build-time warnings by making auth configuration build-safe without using fake production secrets.
Detect merges to main, refresh local context, choose the next unblocked feature, and continue in an isolated Codex worktree that opens a draft PR.
verify: manual workflow inspection plus CI passing on this draft PR

description: Add a lightweight scenario eval for the YC research agent using synthetic companies and rubric-based outcome checks.
Add Zod schema validation to the two unvalidated API routes (research trigger and cancel) to enforce the security rule requiring schema checks at all API boundaries.
verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build

description: Fix the research trigger API route to cancel the Trigger.dev run when a subsequent DB insert fails, preventing dangling runs that keep E2B sandbox resources alive with no tracking record.
verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build

description: Add an eval smoke test for the extractFiltersFromQuery pure function, covering batch aliases, team size patterns, founded year patterns, hiring flags, and cleanedQuery output. Zero I/O dependencies.

Add an eval smoke test for the buildFilterSQL pure function, verifying that $N placeholder indices are sequential and that values array length matches the param count across all 13 filter types and paramOffset variants. Zero I/O dependencies.
Run the three pure smoke evals (research-agent, search-filter, build-filter-sql) inside the CI verify job so filter logic and research invariants are enforced on every PR and main merge.
verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run eval:research-smoke && npm run eval:search-filter-smoke && npm run eval:build-filter-sql-smoke
description: Add an eval smoke test for the parseSearchFilters function (URL param to ParsedFilters), covering string passthrough, array comma-split, boolean coercion, numeric fields, and edge cases. Zero I/O dependencies.

Unify tier metadata (labels, descriptions, styling) currently duplicated between weights.ts (used for result enrichment) and tiered-results-display.tsx to maintain consistent tiering that underpins powerful, intuitive discovery and vector search UX.
verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
